# PERF-015 negative: strconv.AppendInt with reusable buffer
lang: go
file: PERF-015-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

func NumbersToStrings(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	buf := make([]byte, 0, 16)
	for _, v := range values {
		buf = strconv.AppendInt(buf[:0], int64(v), 10)
		out = append(out, strings.Clone(string(buf)))
	}
	return out
}
